title: Dead Channel Protocol - 7 Day Immersion Sample
objective: Demonstrate full daily flow with narrative progression, clues, interactions, puzzle cadence, and immersion-aware personalization.

narrativeProgression.summary: An intake anomaly lands across multiple channels before dawn.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: An app push notification predicts a substation failure and names your trusted ally.

threadUpdates.update: Protocol Wake: An app push notification predicts a substation failure and names your trusted ally.
Peripheral signal tied to Protocol signed payload remains unresolved.

evidenceDrops.title: Dead Channel Protocol - Day 01 police report
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Protocol signed payload.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Dead Channel Protocol ARG artifact Day 01. Type: police_report. Clue focus: Protocol signed payload. Location: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Dead Channel Protocol police_report audio cue for day 1. Clue anchor: Protocol signed payload. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Protocol signed payload and tell me if your last call still stands (none).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Protocol signed payload.

distraction.title: Red Herring 01
distraction.summary: A polished leak points toward an emotionally satisfying suspect, but timeline math does not support it.
distraction.whyItFeelsPlausible: It references Protocol signed payload with convincing formatting and apparent chain-of-custody metadata.
distraction.hiddenFault: Embedded timezone marker is impossible for the claimed capture device, indicating staged fabrication.

awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

puzzle.title: Day 02 Puzzle
puzzle.objective: Use the new evidence and prior logs to resolve contradiction around Substation outage trace.
instructions: Extract timestamp, sender route, and one lexical anomaly from today's artifacts.
Compare against at least one artifact from a previous day.
Submit a concise deduction statement before unlocking the next high-risk contact.
hintLadder: Hint 1: One timestamp appears valid but is offset from device timezone.
Hint 2: Cross-check sender metadata against yesterday's call-log route.
Hint 3: The answer keyword starts with SUBS.
puzzle.failureConsequence: Next day unlock remains delayed until one additional interaction is logged.
